title: Python Overview
text: Python is a general-purpose programming language created by Guido van Rossum. It is widely used for web applications, scripting, data work, and automation.

title: Python Web Frameworks
text: Python's main web frameworks include Django, Flask, and FastAPI.

title: Django Framework
text: Django is a batteries-included framework with an ORM, admin panel, authentication system, and many built-in features.

title: Flask Framework
text: Flask is lightweight and flexible, giving developers more control over application structure.

title: FastAPI Framework
text: FastAPI is modern, async-first, fast, and auto-generates OpenAPI documentation for APIs.

title: JavaScript Overview
text: JavaScript is the dominant language for interactive frontend development and is also used on the server through Node.js.

title: JavaScript Frontend Frameworks
text: JavaScript frontend frameworks include React, Vue, and Angular.

title: React Framework
text: React uses a component model for building interactive user interfaces.
